consistency_summary.lines_over_80_non_generated_note: All 125 overages are package import paths (e.g., 'package:guardianangela/domain/orchestration/strategies/...'). dart format leaves these intact because import URIs cannot be broken.

sealed_hierarchies.abstract_classes_note: All abstract classes are legitimate interface protocols (services/protocols/*.dart, RouteNames static holder, AppTheme holder, EventStrategy base). Not candidates for sealed conversion.

findings.issue: lib/main.dart line 22 has TODO(release-owner) for Sentry project id placeholder
findings.suggested_fix: Resolve before public release; replace placeholder dsn or guard Sentry init with kReleaseMode check.

findings.issue: lib/main.dart line 34 has generic TODO (Phase 6 database init) that is now stale wording
findings.suggested_fix: Remove the stale TODO (DB init already exists elsewhere) or convert to an explanatory doc comment.

findings.issue: lib/features/backup/backup_service.dart line 32: TODO(Phase 15.1) to swap CTR+HMAC for AES-256-GCM
findings.suggested_fix: Track this as an open crypto upgrade before public release; backing comment at line 30 already documents rationale.

findings.issue: lib/data/db/app_database.dart class AppDatabase itself has no /// doc (constructor and methods documented).
findings.suggested_fix: Add a one-line /// comment above `class AppDatabase extends _$AppDatabase` describing it as the Drift SQLCipher database entrypoint.

rtl_natural_check.non_brand_latin_runs_in_rtl: All occurrences are {placeholder} tokens (seconds, description, percent) that must stay Latin by design.
